calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Validity Of Trust And Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-07-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Petitioner.
Franchesca Callejo Court appointed Counsel for Henry Solorzano.
Patricia Hewlett in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that objections were to be filed by today and that nothing has been filed. Ms. Hewlett stated that she met with a Lawyer, that the Lawyer told her that he was going on vacation and that he asked for a continuance. Ms. Hewlett also stated that it is hard to find an Attorney, that no one wants to take the case, that she has retained this Attorney, that she has paid him some money and that the Attorney will be back on the 18th. Ms. Ebey stated that she spoke with the Attorney (Mr. Bigger) yesterday, and that she was told that he was not retained, that he was not paid and that he felt no obligation to participate in this litigation. Ms. Ebey also stated that Mr. Bigger did not mention anything about being on vacation, that Ms. Hewlett has not complied with the order of the Court and that they need to move on. Ms. Callejo raised the issue of Counsel reaching out to Counsel when wanting a continuance, stated that this did not happen, that Mr. Solorzano is in need of funds for his care, that delay is jeopardizing his placement, that he is in a good place and expressed concern about Mr. Solorzano losing his placement because of lack of funds. The Court raised the issue of Ms. Hewlett's lack of standing, noted that she is not a beneficiary under the will, and stated that Ms. Hewlett was provided a reasonable deadline and an extension of that deadline. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Validity of Trust and Confirming Trust Asset based on Patricia Hewlett's lack of standing and the objections having no affect on proceeding on this matter (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Confirm Validity Of Trust And Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-28-2019 Continued To Jun-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Confirm Validity Of Trust And Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-23-2019 Continued To May-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Carmen McMahan.
Patricia Hewlett in Propria Persona.
Franchesca Callejo Court appointed Counsel for Henry Solorzano (Conservatee).
Evyn Shomer for Public Guardian (Temporary Conservator) for Henry Solorzano.

The Court noted that we now have a procedural question of whether Ms. Hewlett has standing in this matter and whether the document that has been brought to the Court's attention does or does not revoke the trust. Ms. Hewlett requested a continuance stating that she is talking with two different Attorneys. Ms. Ebey stated that Ms. Hewlett is a vexatious litigant, that she believes Ms. Hewlett has no standing and that Ms. Hewlett's objection is time barred. Ms. Callejo stated that she was not served with Ms. Hewlett's objection, but her roll at this point is only in the conservatorship. Ms. Shomer raised the issue of expanding Ms. Callejo's scope of representation and stated that she was not served. Ms. Shomer and Ms. Callejo will make a determination as to the scope of representation that is needed and what needs to be presented to the Court. The Petition to Confirm Validity of Trust and Confirming Trust Assets is continued to May 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Any further pleadings are to be filed no later than May 22, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Confirm Validity Of Trust And Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Continued To Apr-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
